metadata.scope: load-bearing L0 assertions and blocking checks for pre-code readiness
source_documents: D11_测试验收与金标回归清单.md
D2_正式对象契约与字段字典.md
D3_正式规则码总表与判定说明书.md
D6_字段策略字典与客户交付字段规范.md
D7_对象级交付矩阵与外发治理规范.md
D13_公开可查边界能力清单.md

assertions.title: project_fact 是唯一正式统一事实中枢
assertions.expected: Top-level project judgement, formal report summary, and saleability decision must consume project_fact rather than recompute from lower-level objects.
failureSignals: project detail API returns top-level judgement without project_fact linkage
UI recomputes main conclusion from rule_hit or raw notice

assertions.title: 双闸门缺一不可
assertions.expected: Formal upgrades require rule_gate_decision=PASS and evidence_gate_decision=PASS together.
failureSignals: AUTO_HIT emitted with only one gate PASS
external action release allowed when any gate is REVIEW or BLOCK

assertions.title: saleable_opportunity 必须消费阶段 6 正式对象
assertions.expected: saleable_opportunity may only originate from project_fact plus formal D8 objects such as challenger profile, buyer fit, and offer recommendation.
failureSignals: sales lead generated directly from single rule hit
saleable_opportunity references CRM note or raw project notice as source of truth

assertions.title: 自然人高限制触达必须受审批、频控与 quiet hours 约束
assertions.expected: Any formal contact release involving natural person high restriction fields must satisfy lawful basis, approval chain, frequency policy, opt-out, and quiet-hours checks.
failureSignals: contact_target auto_contact_allowed true without approval chain
raw phone or email exposed without mask or release gate
touch_record created when opt_out_state is active
